entries.title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
entries.author: Martin Kleppmann
entries.description: A comprehensive guide to building reliable, scalable, and maintainable data systems. Covers databases, streaming, batch processing, and the trade-offs involved in distributed systems design.

entries.title: The Pragmatic Programmer
entries.author: Andrew Hunt & David Thomas
entries.description: Classic guide to software craftsmanship. Covers career development, architectural techniques, and practical tips for writing flexible, adaptable code.

entries.title: Out of the Tar Pit
entries.author: Ben Moseley & Peter Marks
entries.description: Seminal paper on software complexity, identifying state and control as the root causes of complexity in software systems.

entries.title: No Silver Bullet
entries.author: Fred Brooks
entries.description: Classic essay arguing that there is no single development that will promise an order of magnitude improvement in productivity within a decade.

entries.title: Git
entries.author: Linus Torvalds et al.
entries.description: Distributed version control system that is fast, efficient, and scales from small to very large projects with remarkable ease.

entries.title: VS Code
entries.author: Microsoft
entries.description: Free, open-source code editor with excellent debugging support, integrated Git control, syntax highlighting, intelligent code completion, and snippets.
